headline: Scotiabank Cuts Essex Property Trust (ESS) Target, Says Multifamily Recovery Still Uneven
summary: Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) is included among the 15 Best Stocks to Buy Now for Passive Income. On March 4, Scotiabank analyst Nicholas Yulico lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) to $278 from $284. The analyst reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm said it is updating […]

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Essex Property Trust, Lowers Price Target to $271
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $292 to $271.
